entity.summary: Non-custodial on-chain trading platform offering spot, margin, derivatives, and automated-market-maker exchange surfaces under the BMX by Morphex identity on Base and Mode.
entity.notes: Entity-first consolidation completed. DefiLlama's BMX Classic AMM entry is treated as a product surface of the existing BMX Trade identity rather than a separate exchange entity because both use bmx.trade and the Morphex/BMX brand. The parent platform remains active from the reviewed first-party service evidence; the classic AMM surface has substantial cumulative Base and Mode volume but insufficient recent activity evidence for a separate active claim.

evidence.title: Project directory entry
evidence.notes: Project directory identifies the parent trading platform and its product surfaces.

evidence.title: Official trading platform
evidence.notes: First-party project domain used as the current service identity reference.

evidence.title: BMX Classic AMM protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies BMX Classic AMM as a Base and Mode automated-market-maker surface associated with the existing BMX by Morphex trading identity.

evidence.title: BMX Classic AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves the BMX Classic AMM product name and Base and Mode chain associations under the broader BMX Trade identity.

evidence.title: BMX Classic AMM cumulative volume record
evidence.notes: Substantial cumulative DEX volume is preserved for the classic AMM surface, while recent activity is insufficient to justify treating that product surface as a separate active entity.
